global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language.
must_have: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: 这次更新给 Claude Code 和 CodeX 多了一个消息入口，更关键的是把配置动作压到了“自动开网页、扫码即可”。当远程连接从折腾配置变成扫码绑定，试用门槛会明显下降，但它依然更适合轻量协作和即时触发，不适合承接高风险代码操作。
scene_elements: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
visual momentum from old frame to new frame
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only

on_canvas_text.headline: 微信接入不算小修小补，Cla

composition.diagram_focus: time-shift and logic-shift, not feature listing

visual_constraints: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: op7418 Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent. Style profile…

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 把 AI 编程助手接到 IM 里，过去听起来像极客玩具；这次更新后，它开始有一点工作流入口的味道了。2026 年 3 月 24 日，@op7418 提到，原本“Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到飞书 IM 的插件 Claude-to-IM-Skills 更新了”…
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: one top-line verdict and one bottom rule
key_relationships: support fast scanning and strong judgment

on_canvas_text.headline: 直接跳过
on_canvas_text.subheadline: 如果它真的重要，过几个月它…

composition.diagram_focus: high-noise areas that should be skipped

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the skip_board grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这次更新给 Claude Code 和 CodeX 多… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: editorial-poster. Design as a reject-board: fast elimination > detailed explanation.
